title: calamagrostis retrofracta
intro: Calamagrostis retrofracta, also known as hook sideoats-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis retrofracta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
